title: Assistant Center Manager
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Assistant Center Manager to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing all day-to-day operations, ensuring the successful delivery of educational programs, managing staff, and maintaining a positive environment for both students and parents.

Key Responsibilities:

Operations Management:

  • Oversee the daily operations of the center, ensuring that it runs efficiently and effectively.
  • Develop and implement operational policies and procedures to ensure smooth functioning of the center.
  • Manage the center's facilities, ensuring they are well-maintained, safe, and conducive for all activities.
  • Responsible for recruiting new students and managing the renewal process for current students.
  • Manage class schedules, student enrollment, and track attendance.
  • Build strong relationships with students and parents, ensuring excellent communication regarding program updates, student progress, and center activities.
  • Address parent concerns and feedback promptly and professionally.

Staff Leadership and Development:

  • Hire, train, and manage staff, ensuring that they are equipped with the necessary skills and resources.
  • Provide leadership and support to staff,fostering a collaborative and positive work environment.
  • Conduct performance evaluations, offer professional development opportunities, and address any performance issues.

Marketing and Growth:

  • Develop and implement strategies to increase student enrollment and raise awareness of the center’s offerings.
  • Collaborate with the marketing team to create promotional materials, online content, and social media campaigns.

Qualifications:

  • Diploma or higher, preferably in technology, education, or management fields.
  • Minimum of 2 years of experience in operations, preferably in an educational or enrichment setting. Experience in robotics, programming, or STEM-related fields is highly preferred.
  • Candidates without relevant experience but with a Bachelor's degree in a related field can be considered.
  • Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal. Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
  • Passion for AI education and working with children.
  • Ability to work flexible hours, including evenings and weekends.  
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills.

postedCompany.description:
Titan Tech Academy (TTA) delivers hands-on and interdisciplinary applied Problem-Based Learning in cutting-edge technology, and Artificial Intelligence, as well as in entrepreneurship, STEM, and other areas. We ignite the potential of learners through unique learning experiences and gradually foster engineering concepts, design thinking, and an entrepreneurial mindset. 


Our approach enables students to acquire robust and holistic competencies and skills to tackle global uncertainties. TTA is one of the few technology academies with the professional experience, and passion to build a brighter future for the next generation of innovators, entrepreneurs, and leaders.
postedCompany.name: ULTRA DYNAMICS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
